text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear the cries of the aging cicadas! Hark! They
lament our parting!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, the show must go on! From this point
forward, we are a quartet!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In scant time, the autumn Tenno Sho will be upon
us! Are you prepared, Doto?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm... going to do my besht to wival—I mean—to
rival you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I won't lose to Ayabe or Top Road either!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's good to be excited, but don't go dragging me
into your lunatic performances—seriously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ah, um... You all seem like such good friends!
Ahaha...
